creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
I rebuilt all the necessary ports for ktorrent via

portmaster -f net-p2p/ktorrent

after I deleted the port completely.

The error persists. net-p2p/ktorrent can not be build on FreeBSD
10.0-CURRENT/amd64 (most recent version: FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT #0
r233420: Sat Mar 24 12:50:38 CET 2012)

Regards,
Oliver
